ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crimes" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime type */,
  "crime_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime (e.g., Murder, Rape) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime category */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the crime (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime statistic */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the statistic was recorded */,
  "total_persons_under_trial" INTEGER /* Total number of persons under trial, including those from previous years */,
  "persons_compounded_withdrawn" INTEGER /* Number of persons whose cases were compounded or withdrawn */,
  "persons_trial_completed" INTEGER /* Number of persons whose trial was completed */,
  "persons_trial_pending" INTEGER /* Number of persons whose trial remained pending at the end of the year */,
  "persons_convicted" INTEGER /* Number of persons convicted */,
  "jurisdiction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the jurisdiction */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases reported */,
  "average_trial_duration" REAL /* Average duration of trials in days */,
  "highest_sentence" TEXT /* Highest sentence given */,
  "lowest_sentence" TEXT /* Lowest sentence given */,
  "median_sentence" TEXT /* Median sentence given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_jurisdiction_id FOREIGN KEY ("jurisdiction_id") REFERENCES jurisdictions ("jurisdiction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial outcome */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime statistic */,
  "percentage_pending" REAL /* Percentage of persons whose trials remained pending */,
  "percentage_convicted" REAL /* Percentage of persons convicted to trials completed */,
  "average_sentence" TEXT /* Average sentence given */,
  "sentencing_trends" TEXT /* Trends in sentencing (e.g., increasing, decreasing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_outcomes_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES crime_statistics ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., law enforcement, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime statistic being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the crime statistic */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the crime statistic was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser/device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES crime_statistics ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jurisdictions" (
  "jurisdiction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each jurisdiction */,
  "jurisdiction_name" TEXT /* Name of the jurisdiction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the jurisdiction */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the jurisdiction */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the jurisdiction in square kilometers */,
  "head_of_law_enforcement" TEXT /* Name of the head of law enforcement in the jurisdiction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jurisdiction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime report */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type */,
  "jurisdiction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the jurisdiction where the crime was reported */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the crime was reported */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Details of the crime report */,
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person reporting the crime */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the crime was reported */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investigator assigned to the case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_reporting_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_reporting_jurisdiction_id FOREIGN KEY ("jurisdiction_id") REFERENCES jurisdictions ("jurisdiction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_reporting_reporter_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_reporting_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("investigator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime trend */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type */,
  "jurisdiction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the jurisdiction where the trend was observed */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date when the trend was observed */,
  "trend_details" TEXT /* Details of the crime trend */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., rising, falling) */,
  "trend_cause" TEXT /* Possible cause of the trend */,
  "trend_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the trend on the jurisdiction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_trends_jurisdiction_id FOREIGN KEY ("jurisdiction_id") REFERENCES jurisdictions ("jurisdiction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_trends_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the law enforcement agency */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration was initiated */,
  "collaboration_details" TEXT /* Details of the collaboration */,
  "collaborating_agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborating agency */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., intelligence sharing, joint operations) */,
  "collaboration_status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborating_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborating_agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agency_users" (
  "agency_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency user */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the law enforcement agency */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the agency */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the agency */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the user started working in the agency */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the user left the agency (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agency_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agency_users_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the agency */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the agency's headquarters */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the agency was founded */,
  "budget" REAL /* Annual budget of the agency */,
  "number_of_officers" INTEGER /* Number of officers in the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)
